name: yt-timestamp-maker
description: Create, manage, and export timestamps with notes on YouTube videos

scripts.build:chrome: BROWSER=chrome INPUT=content vite build && BROWSER=chrome INPUT=background vite build && BROWSER=chrome INPUT=popup vite build
scripts.build:firefox: BROWSER=firefox INPUT=content vite build && BROWSER=firefox INPUT=background vite build && BROWSER=firefox INPUT=popup vite build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
